title: Sausage Dashin', Grilled Meal
description: A salty and crunchy weeknight Ethiopian-inspired dish featuring grilled sausage.
instructions: Preheat your grill to medium-high heat.
Cut the onion into half-moons and sauté it in a pan with a little oil until translucent, then set aside.
Sauté minced garlic and ginger in the same pan until fragrant. Add red pepper flakes for added flavor if desired.
Trim sausage links, brush them lightly with olive oil, and grill each side over medium-high heat until fully cooked through (165°F/74°C).
Chop cilantro leaves finely and mix it into the sautéed onions. Add chopped tomatoes to the mixture.
Season all ingredients with salt to taste. Combine sausage, sautéed onion-tomato mixture, and cilantro together in a large bowl.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
